nodes.label: GCI0038: DependencyInjectionSafety.CheckServiceLocator
nodes.description: Guard layer detecting service locator anti-pattern in non-infrastructure files. Three-layer guard: IsInfrastructureFile, IsTestFile, then pattern matching.

nodes.label: GCI0038: DirectInstantiationRegex guard
nodes.description: Multi-layer guard for direct instantiation detection using regex + exclusion list. Excludes test doubles, event handlers, and test patterns.

nodes.label: GCI0006: EdgeCaseHandling.CheckNullDereferences
nodes.description: Complex 11-layer guard for null dereference detection. Each guard filters specific safe patterns.

nodes.label: GCI0007: ErrorHandlingIntegrity.CheckSwallowedExceptions
nodes.description: Guard for detecting swallowed exceptions using line-by-line analysis. Filters TaskCanceledException and specific typed catches.

nodes.label: GCI0054: AsyncVoidAbuse.CheckAsyncVoidMethods
nodes.description: Guard detecting async void abuse with event handler exemption via regex matching on method name.

nodes.label: GCI0051: NumericCoercionRisks.CheckExplicitCasts
nodes.description: Numeric casting guard with context analysis. Checks if cast is wrapped in checked{} context.

nodes.label: GCI0032: UncaughtExceptionPath.GuardClauseThrows
nodes.description: Guard identifying defensive guard-clause throws that don't require test coverage. Uses static array of ArgumentNullException patterns.

nodes.label: GCI0003: BehavioralChangeContextAnalyzer
nodes.description: Analyzes security context across files via SecurityCriticalPaths array and SecurityKeywords array to boost confidence scores.

nodes.label: WellKnownPatterns utility
nodes.description: Static utility class providing framework-agnostic guard predicates for test file, generated file, and high-severity log detection.

edges.rationale: EXTRACTED: GCI0038_DependencyInjectionSafety calls IsTestFile and IsInfrastructureFile which delegate to WellKnownPatterns patterns
INFERRED: Both are guard layers within same rule, sequential evaluation pattern
EXTRACTED: CheckNullDereferences calls IsTestFile and IsGeneratedFile from WellKnownPatterns
INFERRED: Exception handling guard follows same framework utility pattern as other rules
EXTRACTED: CheckAsyncVoidMethods explicitly skips test files via WellKnownPatterns.IsTestFile
EXTRACTED: CheckExplicitCasts skips test files using WellKnownPatterns.IsTestFile
INFERRED: Guard clause pattern filtering suggests same defensive guard framework
INFERRED: BehavioralChangeContextAnalyzer uses IsTestFile pattern from WellKnownPatterns
INFERRED: Service locator check runs first, then direct instantiation check in EvaluateAsync order
AMBIGUOUS: Both handle control flow safety but apply to different exception handling patterns. May share DiffContext analysis framework
INFERRED: Both focus on exception propagation: async void loses exception context, swallowed exceptions hide errors

hyperedges.description: Shared multi-layer guard architecture: permission-based filter (context, test), then semantic pattern matching, then context validation
